mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO t_cart_item ( tenant_id, biz_type, user_id, cart_id, sku_id, spu_id, category_id, shop_id, item_name, item_image, item_spec, unit_price, original_price, quantity, subtotal, discount_amount, pay_amount, stock, on_shelf, selected, price_changed, old_price, add_time, add_source, ext_info ) VALUES
( #{item.tenantId}, #{item.bizType}, #{item.userId}, #{item.cartId}, #{item.skuId}, #{item.spuId}, #{item.categoryId}, #{item.shopId}, #{item.itemName}, #{item.itemImage}, #{item.itemSpec}, #{item.unitPrice}, #{item.originalPrice}, #{item.quantity}, #{item.subtotal}, #{item.discountAmount}, #{item.payAmount}, #{item.stock}, #{item.onShelf}, #{item.selected}, #{item.priceChanged}, #{item.oldPrice}, #{item.addTime}, #{item.addSource}, #{item.extInfo} )
ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE cart_id = VALUES(cart_id), spu_id = VALUES(spu_id), category_id = VALUES(category_id), shop_id = VALUES(shop_id), item_name = VALUES(item_name), item_image = VALUES(item_image), item_spec = VALUES(item_spec), unit_price = VALUES(unit_price), original_price = VALUES(original_price), quantity = VALUES(quantity), subtotal = VALUES(subtotal), discount_amount = VALUES(discount_amount), pay_amount = VALUES(pay_amount), stock = VALUES(stock), on_shelf = VALUES(on_shelf), selected = VALUES(selected), price_changed = VALUES(price_changed), old_price = VALUES(old_price), add_source = VALUES(add_source), ext_info = VALUES(ext_info), update_time = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, deleted = 0
